metadata.name: beat det - exact BPM using DFT
metadata.author: martin
metadata.source: martin - beat det - exact BPM using DFT.milk

perFrameCode: //Martin/Nitorami - DFT based beat detection with BPM identification
fg = .4; Q=1; omega = 2*$pi*min(0.5,fg/fps); tcos = cos (omega); alpha = sin(omega)/(2*Q);
b0=(1-tcos)/2; b1=1-tcos; b2=(1-tcos)/2; a0=1+alpha; a1=-2*tcos; a2=1-alpha;
Xa = BPM; LOa= b0a0*Xa + b1a0*in1a + b2a0*in2a - a1a0*ou1a - a2a0*ou2a;
